meta.title: Contact — Request a HUGGO Demo | Within 24h
meta.description: Request a personalized HUGGO demo in 30 seconds. Retailer or distributor, our team calls you back within 24h. No commitment.

hero.title: Request your demo in 30 seconds.
hero.subtitle: Our team calls you back within 24h for a personalized 15-minute demo. You'll see HUGGO in action for your store.

merchant-form.title: You're a retailer? Request a demo.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us more about your business (optional)

merchant-form.micro-text: We'll call you within 24h. No commitment.
merchant-form.success: Thank you! Your request has been sent. Our team will call you within 24h to schedule your demo.
merchant-form.error: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly on WhatsApp.

distributor-form.title: You're a distributor or network? Let's discuss your deployment.
distributor-form.micro-text: Our sales team will get back to you shortly.
distributor-form.success: Thank you! Your request has been forwarded to our sales team. We'll get back to you shortly.
distributor-form.error: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly on WhatsApp.

items.title: No commitment
items.description: Discover HUGGO with no strings attached. The demo is free and without obligation.

items.title: 15-minute demo
items.description: In 15 minutes, you see HUGGO in action for your type of business. Questions, use cases, pricing — we cover everything.

items.title: Callback within 24h
items.description: You fill out the form, we call you back within 24 hours to set a time.
